Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Who is your favorite sannyasi?

Social · asked by user [] · 2009-02-28 · 13 answers
Rules:
it cant be your guru.
explain why is your favorite.
user [374] · 2009-03-06
Srila Prabhupada, He looks gorgeous in sannyasa dress. He feels like a magnet to my iron like mind.
user [33] · 2009-03-06
Same here. Prabhupada, of course. I dont think any reason is needed. Just look at him.
user [19] · 2009-03-06
ok, new rule.

You cant choose Prabhupada.

or say: second favorite...
user [72] · 2009-03-06
Bhakti Vidya Purna Swami because his lectures are pure nectar of Vedic Culture :)
user [33] · 2009-03-06
[quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite]ok, new rule.

You cant choose Prabhupada.

or say: second favorite...[/quote]

Doesnt matter - I still choose Prabhupada. There are no other choices for me.
user [374] · 2009-03-06
I had only one mind and thats gone to Srila Prabhupada. I dont have second mind so dont have any second best. Not trying to criticise other Gurus and sannyasis, there may be many wonderful personalities but I havent come across any second best.
user [375] · 2009-03-06
I agree HH Bhakti Vidya Purna Swami. Excellent standards, absolute nectarian classes, and totally down to earth.
user [19] · 2009-03-07
[quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite][quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite]ok, new rule.

You cant choose Prabhupada.

or say: second favorite...[/quote]

Doesnt matter - I still choose Prabhupada. There are no other choices for me.[/quote]
ok, you are disqualified then. :)
user [154] · 2009-03-07
I quite like Bhaktisiddhanta Sarasvati, but since Gaura Purnima is coming up, I will reveal my secret--I am completely and without a second thought favoring one young sannyasi, who was born in the house of mother Saci and when he took sannyas and lost his beautiful black hair, everyone was weeping. He is completely the one and only Person I can without reservation call my favorite sannyasi, Sri Krishna Caitanya!
user [33] · 2009-03-07
[quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite][quote][cite] Hari Bhakta dasa:[/cite][quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite]ok, new rule.

You cant choose Prabhupada.

or say: second favorite...[/quote]

Doesnt matter - I still choose Prabhupada. There are no other choices for me.[/quote]
ok, you are disqualified then. :)[/quote]

Disqualified for allegance to Prabhupada.

sad state of affairs. silly game.
user [19] · 2009-03-07
Caitanya is kind of breaking the rules too but it is my game so it is ok for now.
user [154] · 2009-03-07
[quote]Hari Bhakta dasa:

[quote]abhiram:

[quote]Hari Bhakta dasa:

[quote]abhiram:ok, new rule.

You cant choose Prabhupada.

or say: second favorite...[/quote]

Doesnt matter - I still choose Prabhupada. There are no other choices for me.[/quote]

ok, you are disqualified then. :)[/quote]

Disqualified for allegance to Prabhupada.

sad state of affairs. silly game.[/quote]

I guess the [u]rule [/u]is that he should not be your guru. And he is the principal [i]siksa [/i]or [i]diksa [/i]guru of all ISKCON (and many non-ISKCON) devotees so...
user [154] · 2009-03-07
[quote]abhiram:Caitanya is kind of breaking the rules too but it is my game so it is ok for now.[/quote]

Actually I did not realize it was a game... If I knew I would have said [i]something else[/i]... like Swami Vivekananda -- he is my favorite object of jokes...
